H: disc_a < 0 implies not structural Rat in F(2,4)
mechanism: disc_a < 0 means a(n) has no real roots, hence no non-negative integer root k with a(k)=0, hence not structural Rat
falsification_test: Enumerate all convergent F(2,4) families; find any with sign_disc_a=-1 NOT in Des
expected_if_false: At least 1 family with sign_disc_a=-1 outside Des

H: degree_profile=(1,1) implies membership in Rat within F(2,4)
mechanism: Linear a(n) and linear b(n) produce a Gauss-type CF that always converges to a rational value
falsification_test: Enumerate all convergent F(2,4) families; find any with degree_profile=(1,1) NOT in Rat
expected_if_false: At least 1 family with degree_profile=(1,1) outside Rat

H: a0_is_zero=True implies membership in Rat within F(2,4)
mechanism: a(0)=0 means n=0 is a root of a(n), so a(0)=0 forces the PCF numerator to vanish at n=0, producing a finite continued fraction (structural Rat)
falsification_test: Enumerate all convergent F(2,4) families; find any with a0_is_zero=True NOT in Rat
expected_if_false: At least 1 family with a0_is_zero=True outside Rat

H: a_eval_1_is_zero=True implies membership in Rat within F(2,4)
mechanism: a(1)=a2+a1+a0=0 means the PCF numerator vanishes at n=1, forcing finite termination (structural Rat)
falsification_test: Enumerate all convergent F(2,4) families; find any with a_eval_1_is_zero=True NOT in Rat
expected_if_false: At least 1 family with a_eval_1_is_zero=True outside Rat

H: b_degree=1 is strongly associated with Trans (ratio=10.1×, p=7.78e-25)
falsification_test: Recompute enrichment ratio on full F(2,4) enumeration; confirm ratio > 5
